race.comment: KING SPIRIT (9) grows a leg for hoop Tierney who has three wins and a placing from just five rides and again gets the benefit of her 3kg claim. Is yet to miss a quinella spot in three spins over this course and distance and should be right there at the business end. DOUBTING EYE (3) saves his best form for his home circuit here and will strip fitter second-up from the break. Likely to play a role in the outcome. DEHORNED UNICORN (7) resumes here but has a handy first-up record and can run a big race while fresh. SUNNYCOAST (4) is a three-time winner here who gets the services of gun hoop Wiggins in the irons. Has to be included in calculations. MEDIA EMPIRE (8) next in line.
